data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having a shared timeline while maintaining private internal notes. However, the evidence provided does not confirm that internal notes are indeed private, nor does it demonstrate how the system enforces this privacy. The linked use case mentions the visibility of details for both organizations but does not specify the handling of internal notes, leading to a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming that internal notes are private while maintaining a shared timeline.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
